metadata.title: Cold-Chain Calculator
metadata.description: Work out the savings, CO₂ avoided and spoilage recovered when NanoFreeze cold layers replace refrigerated transport. Every calculation runs in your browser.

steps.scenarioDesc: Pick how you move your product — domestic or export, in boxes or pallets.
steps.productDesc: What you ship, and how many layers it takes.
steps.spoilageDesc: What you lose today, and how much the layers rescue.
steps.resultsDesc: Your case, with every line on screen.

metrics.hint: Complete the steps to see your case.

scenario.intro: Each scenario loads a worked example with values you can adjust. Switching scenario replaces the values with that example's.
scenario.marketDomesticHint: The refrigerated truck the layers replace.
scenario.marketExportHint: Air freight, with an optional land leg.
scenario.packagingBoxesHint: Layers are cut into strips per box.
scenario.packagingPalletsHint: Layers per pallet, with their own cost and weight.

product.intro: Describe what goes inside {carrier} and how many layers it takes to keep it cold.
product.name: Product
product.boxLengthHint: One strip is 15 cm — rounded up.

logistics.introDomestic: The refrigerated truck the layers replace, and how many times each layer comes back.
logistics.introExport: The air freight you pay for by weight, and the land leg to the airport.
logistics.hasReturnLogistics: I have return logistics (layers come back and are reused)
logistics.outboundDaysHint: The cycle adds outbound, return and re-freeze.
logistics.replaceReeferTruck: Replace the reefer truck on the land leg

spoilage.intro: Of everything you lose, the share the cold chain is to blame for — and what you'd still lose even with layers.
spoilage.coldChainSharePctHint: Of that spoilage, the part temperature caused.

results.intro: At {count, plural, one {# {eventKind, select, trip {trip} other {shipment}}} other {# {eventKind, select, trip {trips} other {shipments}}}} a month, here's the case.
results.notYetPositive: Not yet positive on the first {event}
results.assumptionsNote: FX {trm}/USD{savings} · the USD figure is indicative, not a live rate.

assumptions.title: Model assumptions
assumptions.intro: Every number the model takes for granted, with its explanation. You can change them — the calculation updates instantly.

footer.aboutBody: NanoFreeze's cold-chain savings model, released as free software under the MIT licence. Every calculation runs in your browser.
footer.disclaimer: Results are estimates based on the assumptions you enter. They are not a quote, a commercial offer, or a guarantee of savings. For a formal proposal, talk to NanoFreeze.
footer.privacy: No tracking cookies, no analytics, no server: we collect nothing.
